name: Ryuk Ransomware Command Line Activity Detected
notes:
This is rule detects Ryuk ransomware command line activity.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Vasiliy Burov
SIGMA Title: Ryuk Ransomware Command Line Activity
SIGMA Description: Detects Ryuk Ransomware command lines


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [net.exe or net1.exe]

when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%stop%' AND ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '%samss%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%audioendpointbuilder%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%unistoresvc_%' ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Ryuk Ransomware Command Line Activity Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [net.exe or net1.exe]

AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%stop%' AND  ( 	LOWER("Command") LIKE '%samss%' 	OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%audioendpointbuilder%' 	OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%unistoresvc_%' ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Ryuk Ransomware Command Line Activity Detected
Event description: Detects Ryuk ransomware command line activity.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
